summary: Iteration 51 - Product/Direction Selection in Onboarding and Global Holidays Features Testing Complete. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend verified: Product dropdown (MOIL10, XAUUSD, etc.) and Direction dropdown (BUY, SELL) are present in Onboarding Wizard Step 5. Holiday button (TreePine icon) is correctly REMOVED from Onboarding Wizard. Settings page has Holidays tab with calendar date picker and scheduled holidays list. Global holidays (Jan 20, 2026 and Apr 17, 2026) are configured and show tree icons in calendar.
critical_code_review_comments: OnboardingWizard.jsx: Lines 793-827 render Product and Direction Select dropdowns in Step 5
OnboardingWizard.jsx: TreePine/Holiday button has been REMOVED - only 'I Missed This Trade' button remains
AdminSettingsPage.jsx: Lines 541-547 define Holidays tab trigger with TreePine icon
AdminSettingsPage.jsx: Lines 1577-1689 render Holidays tab content with Calendar and scheduled holidays list
ProfitTrackerPage.jsx: Lines 2233-2267 render global holiday rows with TreePine icons and 'HOLIDAY' text
Backend server.py: Lines 1906-1974 define global holidays endpoints for admin and user access
seed_data_creation: Global holidays exist for Jan 20, 2026 and Apr 17, 2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product and Direction dropdowns are in OnboardingWizard Step 5 (Enter Your Trade Profits). Holiday button (TreePine) has been removed from OnboardingWizard - holidays are now admin-only via Settings > Holidays tab. Global holidays API endpoints work correctly for Super/Master Admin.

feature_1_product_dropdown_in_onboarding.details: Product dropdown with options: MOIL10, XAUUSD, EURUSD, GBPUSD, USDJPY

feature_2_direction_dropdown_in_onboardi.details: Direction dropdown with options: BUY, SELL

feature_3_holiday_button_removed_from_on.details: TreePine/Holiday button has been REMOVED - only 'I Missed This Trade' button remains

feature_4_settings_holidays_tab.details: Holidays tab exists with calendar date picker and scheduled holidays list

feature_5_calendar_date_picker_with_tree.details: Calendar shows tree icons for holiday dates, clicking toggles holiday status

feature_6_scheduled_holidays_list_with_d.details: Shows scheduled holidays (Jan 20, 2026 and Apr 17, 2026) with delete buttons

feature_7_global_holidays_api.details: Super Admin and Master Admin can add/remove global holidays

feature_8_daily_projection_holiday_row.details: Global holidays show as 'HOLIDAY' row with tree icons in Daily Projection table

api_tests.GET /api/admin/global-holidays: PASS - Returns list of global holidays for admins
api_tests.GET /api/trade/global-holidays: PASS - Returns list of global holidays for users
api_tests.POST /api/admin/global-holidays: PASS - Adds global holiday (Super/Master Admin only)
api_tests.POST /api/admin/global-holidays (invalid: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid date format

onboarding_wizard_step5.product_dropdown: MOIL10 selected by default, dropdown arrow visible
onboarding_wizard_step5.direction_dropdown: BUY selected by default, dropdown arrow visible
